audit_question: Is the order terms snapshot retained?
label: Order terms snapshot retained
description: Order terms, acceptance, rejection, cure, warranty, and title/risk snapshots are retained for goods transactions. products=OrdArr,CustomArr,RecordArr; entities=order,transaction; value_type=boolean; operator=equals; expected_value=true; evidence_kind=product_record; required_document_type=none; retention_period=contract_life_plus_policy; failure_severity=major; automatic_failure=false; override_allowed=true.
